testcase.name: test_send_message_with_image
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:89: in test_send_message_with_image assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_customer_dashboard_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: No cancelled-by-studio bookings found for banner test assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:130: in test_customer_dashboard_loads assert len(cancelled_by_studio) > 0, "No cancelled-by-studio bookings found for banner test" E AssertionError: No cancelled-by-studio bookings found for banner test E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])
